_comment: AI Design System — starter settings.json. Take what you want; own the rest. NEVER put API keys or secrets in this file.
_comment_model: No model is pinned on purpose — pick yours with /model, so this file can't go stale. Pin one here only if you want it forced.
_comment_permissions: This is the 'always do / ask first / never do' bucketing from THE-METHOD, Layer 3. Pre-allowing SPECIFIC safe commands is the right move; reaching for --dangerously-skip-permissions is not — that's turning the safety system off, which is not the same as configuring it.

permissions._comment_deny: The 'never do' bucket. A sentence in CLAUDE.md is a REQUEST — the model can still ignore it. An entry here is a RULE, enforced at the tool layer. Anything genuinely destructive belongs here, not in prose.

_comment_hooks: Hooks are where guardrails stop being suggestions. Start empty; add them as you learn which rules the model actually keeps violating. The usual first two: a PostToolUse auto-formatter, and a PreToolUse guard on paths that must never be written. See THE-METHOD, Layer 3, step 4.
